name: Wait then Durable Delay then Finish
description: WaitForSignal (with timeout) -> durable Delay -> Finish. Exercises post-wait durability: the durable delay is a legitimate suspension point, so a drain/resume during it replays from the entry point back through the (already-consumed) wait. The signal must survive as a non-destructive re-read and the timeout deadline must be read from its checkpoint, not recomputed.
